posts.author: PiratePatriotParrot
posts.title:
ICE is proud to stand side by side with our brothers and sisters at 
@TSA
 — this is a message we received from the field:

“I’m at LaGuardia, we did our training and now there’s no wait time. 99% of travelers are happy we’re here helping!”

quotedTweet.content:
ICE is operating the entire TSA pre-check operation in LaGuardia. Checking boarding passes, helping people load bags onto the scanner. TSA agents on metal detectors and screens.

Massive line that stretches to the street, made it through in less than 30 minutes. ICE rocks.

posts.title:
ICE is proud to stand side by side with our brothers and sisters at 
@TSA
 — this is a message we received from the field:

“I’m at LaGuardia, we did our training and now there’s no wait time. 99% of travelers are happy we’re here helping!”

quotedTweet.content:
ICE is operating the entire TSA pre-check operation in LaGuardia. Checking boarding passes, helping people load bags onto the scanner. TSA agents on metal detectors and screens.

Massive line that stretches to the street, made it through in less than 30 minutes. ICE rocks.
